languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

languages.text: "Омниссия даровал немало откровений этим ксеносам, а они превратили их в загадки, порой нерешаемые. Что? Да, Нунциус, я прекрасно понимаю, что для отключения питания нужно нарушить геометрию контура, но боюсь, что без ассистента с... нестандартным мышлением это малоосуществимо".
languages.translation_comment: characters try to solve a Necron riddle to save a space marine

languages.text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

languages.text: 「オムニシアはこれらの異種族に多くの啓示を与え、彼らはそれを時に解けない謎に変えてしまった。何だ？ええ、ヌンシウス、回路の電力を遮断するには回路の幾何学的な形状を乱す必要があることは、私は十分承知している。しかし、非標準的な思考能力を持った助手がいなければ、それは非常に困難である」
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

traits.locale_text: 「オムニシアはこれらの異種族に多くの啓示を与え、彼らはそれを時に解けない謎に変えてしまった。何だ？ええ、ヌンシウス、回路の電力を遮断するには回路の幾何学的な形状を乱す必要があることは、私は十分承知している。しかし、非標準的な思考能力を持った助手がいなければ、それは非常に困難である」

languages.text: « L'Omnimessie a fait de nombreuses révélations à ces xénos, des révélations qu'ils ont transformées en énigmes qui sont, parfois, impossibles à résoudre. Quoi ? Oui, Nuncius, j'ai bien conscience qu'il faut perturber la géométrie du circuit afin de couper le courant, mais sans assistant aux capacités de raisonnement... atypiques, je crains que ce soit loin d'être réalisable. »
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

traits.locale_text: « L'Omnimessie a fait de nombreuses révélations à ces xénos, des révélations qu'ils ont transformées en énigmes qui sont, parfois, impossibles à résoudre. Quoi ? Oui, Nuncius, j'ai bien conscience qu'il faut perturber la géométrie du circuit afin de couper le courant, mais sans assistant aux capacités de raisonnement... atypiques, je crains que ce soit loin d'être réalisable. »

languages.text: "Der Omnissiah hat diesen Xenos viele Offenbarungen gewährt, die sie in Rätsel verwandelt haben, die mitunter unlösbar sind. Was? Ja, Nuncius, ich weiß sehr wohl, dass die Geometrie des Schaltkreises gestört werden muss, um die Energieversorgung zu unterbrechen, aber ich fürchte, ohne einen Assistenten mit ... einer atypischen Denkweise ist das unmöglich."
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

traits.locale_text: "Der Omnissiah hat diesen Xenos viele Offenbarungen gewährt, die sie in Rätsel verwandelt haben, die mitunter unlösbar sind. Was? Ja, Nuncius, ich weiß sehr wohl, dass die Geometrie des Schaltkreises gestört werden muss, um die Energieversorgung zu unterbrechen, aber ich fürchte, ohne einen Assistenten mit ... einer atypischen Denkweise ist das unmöglich."

languages.text: "Hermesih bu zenolara pek çok vahiy bahşetti ve onlar da bunları zaman zaman çözülemez bilmecelere dönüştürdüler. Ne? Evet Nuncius, gücü kesmek için devrenin geometrisinin bozulması gerektiğinin gayet iyi farkındayım ancak korkarım ki... Standart dışı mantık yürütme yeteneğine sahip bir yardımcı olmadan bu pek mümkün değil."
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih bu zenolara pek çok vahiy bahşetti ve onlar da bunları zaman zaman çözülemez bilmecelere dönüştürdüler. Ne? Evet Nuncius, gücü kesmek için devrenin geometrisinin bozulması gerektiğinin gayet iyi farkındayım ancak korkarım ki... Standart dışı mantık yürütme yeteneğine sahip bir yardımcı olmadan bu pek mümkün değil."

languages.text: «El Omnissiah ha concedido numerosas revelaciones a estos xenos, y ellos las han convertido en acertijos que son, en ocasiones, irresolubles. ¿Cómo? Sí, Nuncius, soy consciente de que para cortar la corriente es preciso alterar la geometría del circuito, pero temo que diste mucho de ser factible si no contamos con un ayudante dotado de una mentalidad... poco ortodoxa».
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."

traits.locale_text: «El Omnissiah ha concedido numerosas revelaciones a estos xenos, y ellos las han convertido en acertijos que son, en ocasiones, irresolubles. ¿Cómo? Sí, Nuncius, soy consciente de que para cortar la corriente es preciso alterar la geometría del circuito, pero temo que diste mucho de ser factible si no contamos con un ayudante dotado de una mentalidad... poco ortodoxa».

languages.text: “欧姆尼赛亚赐予了这些异形诸多启迪，而它们却将这些启示转化为时常无法破解的谜题。什么？是的，努恩修斯，我非常清楚，若要切断能量供应，必须扰乱回路的几何结构。但我担心，如果没有一位具备……非常规思维的助手，这几乎难以实现。”
languages.original_text: "The Omnissiah has granted many revelations to these xenos, and they have turned them into riddles that are, at times, unsolvable. What? Yes, Nuncius, I am well aware that in order to cut the power, the geometry of the circuit must be disturbed, but I fear that without an assistant endowed with... non-standard reasoning, it is far from feasible."
